material_warnings.name: inherits_r1_t06_C_near_redundancy_warning
material_warnings.rationale: R1-T07 inherits R1-T06/R1-T05 warnings when interpreting P to C/PCT apparent structure.

material_warnings.name: inherits_r1_t06_V_window_dependent_identity_warning
material_warnings.rationale: V-related paths must be read against the inherited W-sensitive V identity warning.

material_warnings.name: inherits_r1_t06_T_q10_fragmentation_warning
material_warnings.rationale: T-related q10 rows may be affected by inherited fragmentation diagnostics.

material_warnings.name: q_onset_set_not_nested
material_warnings.rationale: q active sets may expand, but onset sets are transition-defined and are not expected to be nested.
